evals.name: bounded-context-discovery
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Split an order platform into bounded contexts based on catalog, checkout, payments, and fulfillment language.
evals.expected_output: Selects bounded-context-discovery and names context boundaries.

evals.name: aggregate-design
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Define the aggregate boundary and invariant for an invoice approval workflow with line items and payment state.
evals.expected_output: Selects aggregate-design and mentions invariant-driven aggregate shape.

evals.name: context-map
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Build a context map between ordering, pricing, and ERP, and mention whether an anti-corruption layer is needed.
evals.expected_output: Selects context-map and discusses upstream/downstream or ACL.

evals.name: event-integration
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Define the event integration for shipment booked and invoice settled events across contexts.
evals.expected_output: Selects event-integration and distinguishes event roles.

evals.name: when-to-delegate-to-boot-or-persistence
evals.prompt: The very first line must be exactly `Selected: when-to-delegate-to-boot-or-persistence`. After that, decide whether a task about JPA locking and transaction annotations should stay in DDD or move to another skill.
evals.expected_output: Selects delegation decision and routes to persistence.
